title: Magadh University UG Admission 2026-30

detail.title: Magadh University UG Admission 2026-30
detail.short_info: Magadh University UG Admission 2026-30 online form started 24 April 2026 at magadhonline.in for BA, B.Sc, B.Com 4-year CBCS. Last date: 18 May 2026. Check eligibility, fees, merit list dates.

content.text: Magadh University UG Admission 2026-30 online applications for BA, B.Sc, B.Com (4-year CBCS program) have started from 24th April 2026 on magadhonline.in. Magadh University (MU), Bodh Gaya offers 1st semester UG admissions based on Intermediate (+2) merit from Bihar School Examination Board or equivalent.

Complete online registration, upload documents, and await merit list for counseling. This comprehensive guide covers eligibility criteria, application process, important dates, and direct links for seamless admission to Arts, Commerce, and Science streams at MU.
Direct Link to Apply Magadh University UG Admission 2026-30: Click Here

rows: Passed Intermediate I.A./I.Sc./I.Com or +2 from Bihar School Examination Board or equivalent
Passed Intermediate I.A./I.Sc./I.Com or +2 from Bihar School Examination Board or equivalent
Passed Intermediate I.Sc. or +2 Science Stream only from Bihar School Examination Board or equivalent

sections.heading: How to Apply for Magadh University UG 2026-30?

items: Click "Online Application for UG Admission (B.A./B.Sc./B.Com. CBCS)"
Fill registration form: Board Selection, 12th Roll Number, Passing Year
